verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're a band of Christian soldiers fighting Satan every day We're standing up for Jesus while we're kneeling down to pray If His precious blood has cleansed you and washed away your sin That makes you a member of the blood washed band

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Praise God, I'm a member of the blood washed band I've been washed in the soul cleansing blood of the Lamb I was bound by chains of sin 'till one day the Master came And made me a member of the blood washed band

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God's children are advancing, marching till we reach the goal For the battle's almost over, we'll soon be going home I can hear the sound of angels as the saints go marching in Singing praises to the captain of the blood washed band
